🎨
MindNotes Pro
Open Source · MIT License
Local-First Whiteboard

Draw freely.
Own your data.

A beautiful whiteboard that feels like painting on real paper. No cloud. No tracking. No subscriptions. Just open it and draw.

<3
Dependencies
<1s
Load Time
0 KB
Server Storage
✏️

6 Brush Types

Pen, pencil, highlighter, calligraphy, glow, eraser

🔒

100% Private

Data never leaves your browser. Works offline as PWA.

⚡

Zero Bloat

Only 3 runtime dependencies. Loads in under a second.

🎨

Monet Aesthetic

Watercolor palettes, glassmorphism, paper textures.

React 18 TypeScript Zustand Vite 5 PWA
